Body.Content:
Stay on top of your inbox with the new Copilot voice experience in the Outlook mobile app. Ask Copilot to summarize your recent unread emails and then take action like flagging, pinning, archiving, or marking as read – all without the hassle of navigating your inbox by hand. You can interrupt or redirect Copilot at any point in the conversation.

GA date: April CY2026

Preview date: November CY2025

message.Title: Outlook: Triage your inbox on-the-go with Copilot voice for Outlook mobile
